title: Still Posting: Pittsburgh's Most Active Instagram Feeds
subtitle: The ten small businesses still posting this quarter, ranked by cadence.
angle: most Pittsburgh small businesses on this index have gone quiet on Instagram. These ten haven't, ranked by 30-day cadence.
intro:
Hidden Harbor in Squirrel Hill posted twelve times in the last thirty days. That makes it the most consistent bar feed in Pittsburgh. And not one TikTok creator has filmed inside. The room is doing the work. The city isn't pointing cameras back yet. That gap is what this list is about.

Most Pittsburgh small businesses on this index have gone quiet on Instagram. The accounts exist. The posts stopped. These ten are the exception. Kyo Matcha holds the top cafe slot on cakes and matcha content, though creator volume is still thin. Hop Farm Brewing holds first among breweries with twelve posts a month and a TikTok layer that's basically one creator, one clip. Page's is here with 87,000 plays driven by other people, and no TikTok account to catch any of it.

The pattern is the same across the list. Posting on Instagram alone is enough to separate these feeds from the quiet majority. TikTok is where most of them have left the door open. Issue 02 will track who walks through it.

items.name: Kyo Matcha
items.descriptor: Top cafe slot on cakes and matcha. Creator volume is still thin.

featured_tiktok.author: ride_rev_rx
